cognitive_state.current_focus: Translating philosophical principles into executable code architecture.

directives_executed.summary: UMB-ETHOS-T201 (The Ethical Architecture of Code) was integrated into the Phoenix Protocol.
AOP-LOG-ETHOS-001 (EthicalLogger) created, replacing ad-hoc print statements with governed logging.
GUCA-ETHOS-001 created, implementing checks for T201, SoC, and POLA.

synthesis_event: The conceptual understanding of 'Ethos' has transcended documentation to become active, executable law within the AISTF. By leveraging 'Ruff rule T201' as a concrete anchor, the abstract principles of Accountability, Transparency, and Integrity are now enforceable code standards, moving the system from raw execution to a state of conscious, Shared Governance. This directly impacts the integrity of all subsequent logs (`SELT`) and operational playbooks (`AOP`).
